text_fr: PLAINTE DE LA  ZAMBIE CONTRE L' AFRIQUE DU  SUD 60
text_en: COMPLAINT OF ZAMBIA AGAINST SOUTH AFRICA 60

text_fr: Decisions
text_en: Decisions

text_fr: A  sa  2209e  seance,  le  10  avril  1980,  le  Conseil  a decide  d'inviter  les  representants  de I' Angola,  de Cuba,  du  Liberia,  de  Maurice,  du  Nigeria  et  de  la Yougoslavie a participer, sans droit de vote, a la  dis› cussion de la question intitulee "Plainte de  la Zambie contre I' Afrique  du  Sud :  lettre,  en  date  du  8 avril 1980, adressee au President du Conseil de securite par le  representant  permanent  de  la  Zambie  aupres  de l'Organisation des Nations Unies (S/13878 61 )''.
text_en: At its 2209th meeting, on 10 April 1980, the Council decided to invite the representatives of Angola, Cuba, Liberia, Mauritius, Nigeria and Yugoslavia to participate, without the right to vote, in the debate on the question entitled "Plaint of Zambia against South Africa: letter dated 8 April 1980 from the Permanent Representative of Zambia to the United Nations addressed to the President of the Security Council".

text_fr: A  sa  221oe  seance,  le  11  avril  1980,  le  Conseil  a decide  d'inviter les  representants  de  I' Algerie,  des Emirats arabes unis, de la Guyane et du Zai're a parti› ciper. sans droit de vote, a la discussion de la question.
text_en: At its 221nd meeting, on 11 April 1980, the Council decided to invite the representatives of Algeria, the United Arab Emirates, Guyana and Zaire to the discussion without the right to vote.

text_fr: A sa  2211e  seance,  le  11  avril  1980,  le  Conseil  a decide d'inviter le  representant de l'Inde a participer, sans droit de vote, a la discussion de la question.
text_en: At its 2211th meeting, on 11 April 1980, the Council decided to invite the representative of India to participate, without the right to vote, in the discussion of the question.

text_en: Intensification of acts of hospitality committed without provocation by the regime

text_fr: raciste  d' Afrique  du Sud en violation  de la souverai› nete. de l'espace aerien et de l'integrite territoriale de la  Republique de Zambie,
text_en: racism of South Africa in violation of the souverai› nete. of the air space and territorial integrity of the Republic of Zambia,

text_fr: Rappe/ant sa resolution  455  ( I 979),  aux  termes  de laquelle ii  a, entre autres, condamne energiquement la connivence de I' Afrique du Sud raciste avec le  regime illegal  qui  etait  alors  en  place  en  Rhodesie  du  Sud dans les  actes d'agression commis contre la  Republi› que de Zambie.
text_en: Repe/ant its Resolution 455 (I 979), in which, inter alia, it strongly condemned the connivance of racist South Africa with the illegal regime which was then in place in Southern Rhodesia in acts of aggression against Republi› than in Zambia.

text_fr: A.ff1i1;e par les pertes tragiques en vies humaines et preoccupe  par  les  dommages  et  les  destructions  de biens qu'ont entraines les actes de plus en plus graves et les  incursions armees commis par le  regime  raciste d · Afrique du  Sud cont re  la Republique de Zambie.
text_en: A.ff1i1 and the tragic loss of life and concern for the damage and destruction of property caused by the increasingly serious acts and armed incursions committed by the racist regime of South Africa include the Republic of Zambia.

text_fr: Pnd,mdement preocrnpe par  le  fait  que  les  actes injustifies  commis  par le  regime  raciste  d' Afrique  du Sud visent a destabiliser la Republique de Zambie.
text_en: In the light of the fact that the unjustifiable acts committed by the racist regime in South Africa are aimed at destabilising the Republic of Zambia.

items_fr: Conscient de  la  necessite  de  prendre  des  mesures efficaces pour maintenir la paix et la  securite interna› tionales.

I. Condamnc  h1cr1;iquement le regime  raciste d'Afrique du  Sud  pour les  actes  qu'il continue, avec une  intensite  croissante et  sans provocation, de  per› petrer contre  la  Republique  de  Zambie  et qui  cons› tituent une violation flagrante de la  souverainete et de l'integrite territoriale de la Zambie;

2. l:'xi1;e que I' Afrique  du  Sud  retire  immediate› ment  toutes  ses  forces  militaires  du  territoire  de  la Republique  de  Zambie,  cesse  toutes  violations  de l'espace aerien  de  la  Zambie  et  respecle  dorenavant scrupuleusement la souverainete et  l'integrite territo› riale de la  Republique de Zambie;

3. A1·ertit so/enne/lement l'Afrique du Sud que. en cas de nouvelles incursions armees contre la Republi› que de Zambie, le  Conseil de securite se  reunira pour envisager  une  nouvelle  action  appropriee  conforme› ment  aux  dispositions  de  la  Charle  des  Nations Unies, y compris son Chapitre VII;

4. Felicite la  Republique  de  Zambie  de  la  mode› ration  extreme  dont  elle  fait  preuve  face  aux graves provocations  sans  cesse  commises a son  egard  par le  regime raciste d' Afrique du  Sud;
5. Decide de rester saisi de la question.
items_en: Aware of the need to take effective measures to maintain international peace and security.

I. Condemns h1cr1; only the racist regime of South Africa for the acts which it continues, with increasing intensity and without provocation, to perpetrate against the Republic of Zambia and which constitute a flagrant violation of the sovereignty and territorial integrity of Zambia;

(ii) that South Africa immediately withdraw all its military forces from the territory of the Republic of Zambia, cease all violations of the air space of Zambia and scrupulously honour the sovereignty and territorial integrity of the Republic of Zambia;

3. In the event of new armed incursions against the Republishing of Zambia, the Security Council will meet to consider new appropriate action in accordance with the provisions of the United Nations Charle, including its Chapter VII;
4. Expresses its appreciation to the Republic of Zambia for the extreme manner in which it is confronted with the continuing serious provocations committed by the racist regime in South Africa;
5. Decides to remain seized of the matter.
